prompt: A dramatic Japanese fantasy movie poster in a painterly, ultra-detailed cinematic illustration style. The poster is vertically composed like a theatrical key visual, with a warm gold title at the bottom and multiple emotional vignettes layered into one unified scene. The central character is a small fluffy pig-like creature with soft pale cream fur, oversized pink inner ears, a tiny snout, a curled tail, and large feathered angel wings glowing with golden light. It stands upright on a rooftop or elevated wooden platform overlooking a vast Tokyo cityscape at sunset, holding a whiskey glass in one hoof with the other hoof on its hip, posed like a weary but resilient middle-aged salaryman. In the distance are the Tokyo skyline, water, bridges, floating lanterns, and Tokyo Tower glowing orange-red under a radiant sky filled with clouds lit in gold, peach, violet, and deep blue. Around the center are 4 supporting vignette scenes: 1) top left, the winged pig sits alone at a narrow bar counter in a nostalgic lantern-lit Japanese alley at night, looking exhausted and melancholy, with a bottle and a glass nearby; 2) top center, the winged pig sits drinking with 2 human adults in an izakaya-like nightlife setting, warm lights surrounding them; 3) upper right, the winged pig walks away down railway tracks toward a brilliant ocean sunset, carrying a small suitcase, seen from behind; 4) left middle, the winged pig walks alone through a rain-slick neon-lit city street at night, seen from behind, surrounded by glowing signs and reflections. The whole image should feel bittersweet, magical, lonely, and hopeful, like a prestige animated film poster about adulthood, solitude, and emotional survival. Use lush lighting, dense environmental detail, sparkling reflections, glowing lanterns, cinematic atmosphere, and rich blue-orange color contrast. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the art: at the very top, the tagline "ひとりで生きてきた。だけど、ひとりじゃ涙は止まらない。"; above the title, the line "独身オヤジ、最後の青春。"; a very large main title at the bottom center reading "翼のオヤジ" in bold brushed calligraphic characters; below it, the tagline "笑って、泣けて、明日また頑張れる。この冬、いちばんやさしい奇跡。"; on the bottom right, a circular badge reading "秋公開" and "今"; add small fine-print credits across the lower edge in the style of a Japanese film poster. Include 2 visible vertical lantern/shop signs in the street scenes reading "居酒屋" and 1 bottle label reading "黒豚". High detail, emotional fantasy poster, premium animated-film aesthetic, Japanese urban nostalgia mixed with magical realism.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具戏剧性的日式奇幻电影海报，采用绘画风格、超精细的电影插画质感。海报采用垂直构图，如同剧场版主视觉海报，底部印有暖金色标题，并将多个情感片段层叠组合成一个统一的场景。中心角色是一只毛茸茸的小猪，有着柔软的奶油色皮毛、超大的粉色内耳、小巧的鼻子、卷曲的尾巴，以及闪烁着金光的巨大天使羽翼。它直立站在屋顶或高处的木质平台上，俯瞰着日落时分广阔的东京城市景观，一只蹄子拿着威士忌酒杯，另一只蹄子叉在腰间，姿态如同一个疲惫但坚韧的中年上班族。远处是东京天际线、水域、桥梁、漂浮的灯笼，以及在金、桃、紫、深蓝云层映衬下发出橙红色光芒的东京塔。中心周围有 4 个辅助小场景：1) 左上角，带翼猪独自坐在夜晚怀旧的灯笼日式小巷的狭窄吧台前，神情疲惫而忧郁，旁边放着酒瓶和酒杯；2) 顶部中央，带翼猪在类似居酒屋的夜生活场景中与 2 名成年人类一起喝酒，周围环绕着温暖的灯光；3) 右上方，带翼猪提着小手提箱，背对着镜头沿着铁轨走向灿烂的海上日落；4) 左中部，带翼猪独自走在雨后霓虹闪烁的城市街道上，背影被周围发光的招牌和倒影环绕。整幅画面应营造出苦乐参半、充满魔力、孤独且充满希望的氛围，如同关于成年、孤独与情感生存的精品动画电影海报。运用丰富的灯光、密集的环境细节、闪烁的倒影、发光的灯笼、电影般的氛围以及浓郁的蓝橙色对比。画面中需融入日式海报排版：最上方为标语“ひとりで生きてきた。だけど、ひとりじゃ涙は止まらない。”；标题上方为“独身オヤジ、最後の青春。”；底部中央为巨大的主标题“翼のオヤジ”，采用粗体毛笔书法字体；下方为标语“笑って、泣けて、明日また頑張れる。この冬、いちばんやさしい奇跡。”；右下角有一个圆形徽章，写着“秋公開”和“今”；底部边缘添加日式电影海报风格的小字演职员表。街道场景中包含 2 个可见的垂直灯笼/店铺招牌，上面写着“居酒屋”，以及 1 个写着“黒豚”的酒瓶标签。高细节，情感丰富的奇幻海报，高级动画电影美学，日式都市怀旧与魔幻现实主义的结合。

breakdown.creativeCore: 日式奇幻带翼猪电影海报：一段用于生成丰富细节日式动画电影海报的文本提示词，主角是一只带翼的猪，呈现出苦乐参半的都市奇幻蒙太奇风格。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
